text: Let me tell you 2 things. 1. That let anybody do age fraud. India is now strong in cricket. So, BCCI strictly do bone testing of every players to determine their age. And also Manjot kalra (u19 final MoM was banned). Basically this system has decreased age fraud. Almost every cricket who played for india has done age fraud. I personally know about rishabh pant. His father thought, let's decrease it by 1.5 years and wrote his DOB as 27 march 2011 coz bone test have 2 year margin as he was smart enough to not cross limit. text:
You cannot get him out with his weaknesses at this moment, only way out is to make his strength as his weakness.

His game is all about reflexes. He has probably one of the best hand-eye coordination in the game right now and that comes through the combination of immense practice + young age + high mental focus + insane self belief.

You cannot change anything in his practice or age or self belief at the moment, the only thing you can disrupt is his focus.

Right now, he gets extremely frustrated if he doesn't meet his own standards. He hates if he underperforms. This is his weakness, which comes from his strength i.e., performance every game.

The only way to make him lose focus is to just keep bowling those yorkers and cut his runs and frustrate him with lack of boundaries. He'll try doing something that's not his natural game and that's where you'll find opportunities to get him out.
label: analysis

text:
3 suggestions :

Every pitch should have their speciality... Like some slower sluggish, some pitches being rank turner, some swing paradise, some with wobbly bounce, some have uneven bounce aka two paced and some bouncy like perth or south africa...

No impact player -> hampers all rounder and top order part timers a lot. (Need suresh raina , yuvi nad Sachin paajis more)

Powerplay divide -> 3 over batting powerplay (2 fielders outside - first 3) and 3 over bowling powerplay (6 fielders outside max - decided by fielding team after first 3 over, if time is delayed one fielder reduction to max limit)

Personally like 150-160 games, both parties are involved. Where 180 is hard to achieve and 200 is rare
